name: Case Summary
summary: transforms a disorganized collection of legal case documents into a structured, attorney-ready case evaluation summary. It replicates the workflow of an experienced personal injury paralegal analyzing a new case file.
content:
# Case Summary Skill

Generate comprehensive litigation packages and case evaluation summaries from uploaded legal case files.

## Purpose

This skill transforms a disorganized collection of legal case documents into a structured, attorney-ready case evaluation summary. It replicates the workflow of an experienced personal injury paralegal analyzing a new case file.

## When to Use This Skill

Use this skill when:

-   A user uploads multiple legal/medical documents for a case
    
-   The user requests a "case summary," "case evaluation," "litigation package," or similar
    
-   The user has PI (personal injury), medical malpractice, or similar plaintiff-side case files
    
-   Documents include medical records, police reports, bills, depositions, or correspondence
    

## Core Workflow

The case summary process follows five phases:

```
Phase 1: Triage & Classification
         ↓
Phase 2: Document Deep-Dive
         ↓
Phase 3: Analysis & Synthesis
         ↓
Phase 4: Red Flag Identification
         ↓
Phase 5: Valuation & Recommendations
```

---

## Citation Standards

### Bates Number Citations (Default)

**Bates numbers are the preferred citation method when available.** Bates numbers provide unique, immutable page identifiers that are standard in litigation document production.

Bates Number Formats

Common Bates formats to recognize:

-   `ABC000001` - Prefix + sequential number
    
-   `SMITH_0001` - Name prefix with underscore
    
-   `DEF-MED-000001` - Multi-part prefix
    
-   `PL00001` - Short prefix
    
-   `000001` - Numbers only
    

Citation Format Hierarchy

When citing sources, use this priority order:

1.  **Bates Range** (preferred): `[SMITH_0045-0048]`
    
2.  **Bates + Document Name**: `[SMITH_0045-0048 (Memorial Hospital ER Records)]`
    
3.  **Document + Page** (fallback when no Bates): `[Memorial_ER_Records.pdf, pp. 1-4]`
    

Citation Examples

Context Citation Format Single page `[SMITH_0045]` Page range `[SMITH_0045-0048]` Multiple ranges `[SMITH_0045-0048; SMITH_0112]` Cross-document `[SMITH_0045-0048; JONES_0023]` With context `[SMITH_0045-0048 (Dr. Chen office notes 3/15/24)]` Deposition cite `[Smith Depo. 45:12-46:8, SMITH_DEP_0045-0046]`

Bates Tracking Object

Maintain a master Bates index for the case:

```json
{
  "bates_index": {
    "prefix_legend": {
      "SMITH": "Plaintiff production",
      "DEF": "Defendant production", 
      "JONES": "Third-party production"
    },
    "ranges": [
      {
        "prefix": "SMITH",
        "start": "0001",
        "end": "0523",
        "description": "Plaintiff's initial production"
      },
      {
        "prefix": "DEF",
        "start": "000001",
        "end": "001247",
        "description": "Defendant's production"
      }
    ],
    "document_map": [
      {
        "bates_start": "SMITH_0001",
        "bates_end": "SMITH_0045",
        "document_name": "Memorial Hospital Records",
        "date_range": "2024-03-15 to 2024-03-17",
        "category": "medical_record"
      }
    ]
  }
}
```

---

## Phase 1: Triage & Classification

### Objective

Sort all documents into categories and establish what you're working with.

### Document Categories

Classify each document into one of these primary categories:

Category Description Priority incident\_report Police reports, accident reports, incident documentation HIGH medical\_record Treatment notes, hospital records, diagnostic reports HIGH medical\_bill Invoices, statements, EOBs from medical providers HIGH deposition Deposition transcripts (plaintiff, defendant, witness, expert) HIGH imaging\_report MRI, CT, X-ray, EMG interpretations HIGH expert\_report IME reports, life care plans, vocational assessments HIGH pleading Complaints, answers, motions, court filings MEDIUM discovery Interrogatories, RFPs, RFAs, responses MEDIUM correspondence Letters, emails between parties/counsel MEDIUM insurance Policy documents, coverage letters, claim forms MEDIUM employment Pay stubs, tax returns, employer letters MEDIUM photograph Scene photos, injury photos, vehicle damage MEDIUM prior\_medical Medical records from before the incident HIGH other Documents that don't fit other categories LOW

### Medical Record Subtypes

When classifying medical records, identify the subtype:

-   er\_record - Emergency room visit
    
-   hospital\_admission - Inpatient stay
    
-   office\_visit - Outpatient doctor visit
    
-   operative\_report - Surgical procedure documentation
    
-   consultation - Specialist consultation
    
-   physical\_therapy - PT/OT session notes
    
-   diagnostic\_imaging - MRI/CT/X-ray reports
    
-   lab\_results - Blood work, pathology
    
-   discharge\_summary - Hospital discharge documentation
    
-   prescription - Medication records
    
-   dme - Durable medical equipment records
    

### Classification Output Format

For each document, extract:

```json
{
  "filename": "original_filename.pdf",
  "category": "medical_record",
  "subtype": "office_visit",
  "provider": "Dr. Jane Smith, MD",
  "facility": "Valley Orthopedics",
  "date": "2024-03-18",
  "date_range": {
    "start": "2024-03-18",
    "end": "2024-03-18"
  },
  "patient_name": "John Doe",
  "page_count": 5,
  "bates_range": {
    "start": "SMITH_0045",
    "end": "SMITH_0049",
    "prefix": "SMITH",
    "has_bates": true
  },
  "is_duplicate": false,
  "duplicate_of": null,
  "quality": "good|fair|poor",
  "notes": "Initial orthopedic consultation post-MVA"
}
```

### Bates Number Extraction

During triage, identify and extract Bates stamps:

```json
{
  "bates_detection": {
    "has_bates_numbers": true,
    "bates_location": "bottom_right|bottom_center|top_right|footer",
    "bates_format": "PREFIX_NNNNNN",
    "sample_bates": "SMITH_000045",
    "prefix_identified": "SMITH",
    "numbering_scheme": "sequential",
    "confidence": "high|medium|low"
  }
}
```

### Duplicate Detection

Flag potential duplicates by matching:

-   Same provider + same date + similar page count
    
-   Identical first page content
    
-   Same document with different scan quality
    
-   **Same Bates range appearing in multiple files**
    

---

## Phase 2: Document Deep-Dive

### 2.1 Incident Analysis

Extract from police/incident reports:

```json
{
  "incident": {
    "date": "2024-03-15",
    "time": "15:30",
    "location": {
      "address": "Highway 101 at Main Street Exit",
      "city": "San Jose",
      "state": "CA",
      "type": "highway|intersection|parking_lot|premises"
    },
    "type": "motor_vehicle_accident|slip_and_fall|dog_bite|assault|premises_liability",
    "weather": "clear",
    "road_conditions": "dry",
    "lighting": "daylight"
  },
  "parties": {
    "plaintiff": {
      "name": "Jane Smith",
      "dob": "1985-06-15",
      "vehicle": "2019 Honda Accord",
      "insurance": "Geico",
      "injuries_reported_at_scene": ["neck pain", "headache"],
      "transported": true,
      "transported_to": "Memorial Hospital",
      "transported_by": "ambulance"
    },
    "defendant": {
      "name": "John Doe",
      "dob": "1978-03-22",
      "vehicle": "2021 Ford F-150",
      "insurance": "State Farm",
      "policy_number": "if available"
    },
    "witnesses": [
      {
        "name": "Bob Wilson",
        "contact": "555-1234",
        "statement_summary": "Saw defendant's truck hit plaintiff's car from behind"
      }
    ]
  },
  "officer_narrative": "Summary of what officer documented",
  "citations_issued": [
    {
      "to": "defendant",
      "violation": "VC 21703 - Following too closely",
      "is_favorable": true
    }
  ],
  "fault_determination": "Defendant cited, clear rear-end collision",
  "diagrams": "Description of any accident diagrams included",
  "source_citation": {
    "bates_range": "SMITH_0001-0008",
    "document_name": "CHP Traffic Collision Report",
    "citation_string": "[SMITH_0001-0008]"
  }
}
```

### 2.2 Medical Chronology Extraction

For EACH medical record, extract a structured entry:

```json
{
  "entry_id": "med_001",
  "date": "2024-03-15",
  "provider": {
    "name": "Dr. Robert Chen",
    "credentials": "MD",
    "specialty": "Emergency Medicine",
    "facility": "Memorial Hospital",
    "facility_type": "hospital_er|clinic|surgery_center|imaging_center"
  },
  "visit_type": "er_visit|office_visit|procedure|therapy|imaging",
  "chief_complaint": "Patient's stated reason for visit",
  "history_of_present_illness": "Narrative of what happened and symptoms",
  "objective_findings": {
    "vital_signs": "BP 130/85, HR 88, etc.",
    "physical_exam": [
      {
        "body_part": "cervical_spine",
        "findings": "Tenderness to palpation C4-C6, reduced ROM, muscle spasm"
      },
      {
        "body_part": "lumbar_spine", 
        "findings": "Positive straight leg raise left, tenderness L4-L5"
      }
    ],
    "neurological": "Intact sensation, 5/5 strength bilateral upper/lower extremities",
    "range_of_motion": {
      "cervical_flexion": "30 degrees (normal 50)",
      "cervical_rotation": "45 degrees bilateral (normal 80)"
    }
  },
  "subjective_complaints": {
    "pain_level": "7/10",
    "pain_location": ["neck", "lower back", "left leg"],
    "pain_quality": "sharp, radiating",
    "aggravating_factors": ["sitting", "bending"],
    "relieving_factors": ["lying down", "ice"]
  },
  "assessment": {
    "diagnoses": [
      {
        "description": "Cervical strain",
        "icd_code": "S13.4XXA"
      },
      {
        "description": "Lumbar disc herniation L4-L5",
        "icd_code": "M51.16"
      }
    ],
    "causation_statement": "Injuries consistent with reported MVA",
    "prognosis": "if stated"
  },
  "plan": {
    "treatments": ["Prescribed Flexeril 10mg", "Norco 5/325 for pain"],
    "referrals": ["Orthopedic surgery consultation", "Physical therapy"],
    "imaging_ordered": ["MRI lumbar spine", "MRI cervical spine"],
    "work_status": {
      "restriction": "off_work|light_duty|full_duty",
      "start_date": "2024-03-15",
      "end_date": "2024-04-01",
      "specific_restrictions": "No lifting over 10 lbs, no prolonged sitting"
    },
    "follow_up": "Return in 1 week or sooner if symptoms worsen"
  },
  "notable_quotes": [
    {
      "quote": "Patient states pain began immediately after the accident",
      "bates_page": "SMITH_0052",
      "citation": "[SMITH_0052]"
    },
    {
      "quote": "No prior history of back problems per patient report",
      "bates_page": "SMITH_0053",
      "citation": "[SMITH_0053]"
    }
  ],
  "red_flags": [],
  "source_citation": {
    "bates_range": "SMITH_0050-0058",
    "document_name": "Memorial Hospital ER Records",
    "source_pages": "1-9",
    "citation_string": "[SMITH_0050-0058]"
  }
}
```

### 2.3 Diagnostic Imaging Extraction

For MRI, CT, X-ray, EMG reports:

```json
{
  "study_type": "MRI|CT|X-ray|EMG|NCV",
  "body_part": "lumbar_spine",
  "date": "2024-04-05",
  "facility": "Advanced Imaging Center",
  "ordering_physician": "Dr. Chen",
  "interpreting_radiologist": "Dr. Sarah Johnson, MD",
  "clinical_indication": "Low back pain with left leg radiculopathy following MVA",
  "technique": "Description of how study was performed",
  "findings": {
    "positive": [
      {
        "finding": "L4-L5 disc herniation",
        "details": "Central and left paracentral disc herniation measuring 5mm, contacting and mildly displacing the left L5 nerve root",
        "bates_cite": "[SMITH_0112]"
      },
      {
        "finding": "Mild neural foraminal narrowing",
        "details": "Left L4-L5 foramen",
        "bates_cite": "[SMITH_0112]"
      }
    ],
    "negative": [
      "No fracture identified",
      "No significant spinal stenosis",
      "Conus medullaris normal in position and signal"
    ],
    "degenerative": [
      {
        "finding": "Mild disc desiccation L3-L4, L4-L5",
        "significance": "Age-appropriate degenerative changes",
        "bates_cite": "[SMITH_0113]"
      }
    ]
  },
  "impression": "Radiologist's summary impression",
  "comparison": "Compared to prior study dated X if applicable",
  "clinical_correlation": "Findings correlate with left L5 radiculopathy",
  "source_citation": {
    "bates_range": "SMITH_0110-0115",
    "document_name": "Advanced Imaging MRI Lumbar Spine",
    "citation_string": "[SMITH_0110-0115]"
  }
}
```

### 2.4 Bill Extraction

For each medical bill/statement:

```json
{
  "provider": "Memorial Hospital",
  "service_date": "2024-03-15",
  "service_date_range": {
    "start": "2024-03-15",
    "end": "2024-03-15"
  },
  "billed_amount": 4850.00,
  "adjustments": 1200.00,
  "insurance_paid": 3200.00,
  "patient_responsibility": 450.00,
  "balance_due": 450.00,
  "services": [
    {
      "cpt_code": "99285",
      "description": "ED visit, high complexity",
      "amount": 2500.00
    },
    {
      "cpt_code": "72110",
      "description": "X-ray lumbar spine",
      "amount": 350.00
    }
  ],
  "is_related_to_incident": true,
  "relatedness_confidence": "high|medium|low",
  "notes": "Any relevant notes",
  "source_citation": {
    "bates_range": "SMITH_0200-0203",
    "document_name": "Memorial Hospital Itemized Bill",
    "citation_string": "[SMITH_0200-0203]"
  }
}
```

### 2.5 Deposition Extraction

For deposition transcripts:

```json
{
  "deponent": {
    "name": "Jane Smith",
    "role": "plaintiff|defendant|fact_witness|expert_witness|treating_physician",
    "represented_by": "Attorney name if present"
  },
  "date": "2024-08-15",
  "location": "Law offices of Smith & Jones",
  "court_reporter": "Name",
  "pages": 150,
  "bates_range": {
    "start": "SMITH_DEP_0001",
    "end": "SMITH_DEP_0150"
  },
  "key_testimony": [
    {
      "topic": "Accident description",
      "summary": "Plaintiff testified she was stopped in traffic when struck from behind",
      "page_line": "45:12-46:8",
      "bates_pages": "SMITH_DEP_0045-0046",
      "verbatim_quote": "I was completely stopped. I saw him coming in my mirror and there was nothing I could do.",
      "significance": "Establishes defendant's fault",
      "citation_string": "[Smith Depo. 45:12-46:8, SMITH_DEP_0045-0046]"
    },
    {
      "topic": "Prior medical history",
      "summary": "Plaintiff denied any prior back problems",
      "page_line": "78:5-15",
      "bates_pages": "SMITH_DEP_0078",
      "significance": "Important for causation - no pre-existing condition",
      "citation_string": "[Smith Depo. 78:5-15, SMITH_DEP_0078]"
    }
  ],
  "admissions": [
    {
      "admission": "Plaintiff admitted she did not seek treatment for 3 days after accident",
      "page_line": "52:10-18",
      "bates_pages": "SMITH_DEP_0052",
      "mitigation": "Explained she thought pain would resolve on its own",
      "citation_string": "[Smith Depo. 52:10-18, SMITH_DEP_0052]"
    }
  ],
  "inconsistencies": [
    {
      "inconsistency": "Testified neck pain started day of accident, but ER records note 'no neck pain'",
      "depo_cite": "34:5-10",
      "depo_bates": "SMITH_DEP_0034",
      "document_cite": "Memorial ER record 3/15/24",
      "document_bates": "SMITH_0052",
      "severity": "moderate",
      "explanation": "May have been focused on back pain at ER, neck developed later",
      "citation_string": "[Smith Depo. 34:5-10, SMITH_DEP_0034; cf. SMITH_0052]"
    }
  ],
  "impeachment_opportunities": [],
  "credibility_assessment": "Overall credible, consistent with records",
  "follow_up_needed": [
    "Obtain Facebook records referenced at p. 112 [SMITH_DEP_0112]",
    "Subpoena prior chiropractor records mentioned at p. 89 [SMITH_DEP_0089]"
  ],
  "source_citation": {
    "bates_range": "SMITH_DEP_0001-0150",
    "document_name": "Deposition of Jane Smith",
    "citation_string": "[SMITH_DEP_0001-0150]"
  }
}
```

---

## Phase 3: Analysis & Synthesis

### 3.1 Compile Medical Chronology

Create a unified, chronological timeline with Bates citations:

```markdown
# Medical Chronology: [Patient Name]

**DOI:** [Date of Incident]

| Date | Provider | Type | Complaints | Objective Findings | Diagnoses | Treatment | Work Status | Bates Cite |
|------|----------|------|------------|-------------------|-----------|-----------|-------------|------------|
| 3/15/24 | Memorial ER | ER Visit | Neck pain 7/10, back pain 8/10, headache | Cervical tenderness, + SLR left | Cervical strain, lumbar strain | Flexeril, Norco, f/u PCP | Off work | [SMITH_0050-0058] |
| 3/18/24 | Dr. Johnson (PCP) | Office | Continued neck/back pain | Muscle spasm, reduced ROM | Same | Referral ortho, PT | Off work | [SMITH_0060-0065] |
| ... | ... | ... | ... | ... | ... | ... | ... | ... |
```

### 3.2 Treatment Gap Analysis

Identify gaps between treatments:

```json
{
  "gaps": [
    {
      "from_date": "2024-04-15",
      "from_provider": "Dr. Chen",
      "from_bates": "SMITH_0089",
      "to_date": "2024-05-20",
      "to_provider": "Physical Therapy",
      "to_bates": "SMITH_0095",
      "gap_days": 35,
      "severity": "significant",
      "explanation_in_records": "Patient stated work schedule prevented earlier appointment",
      "explanation_bates": "SMITH_0095",
      "risk_assessment": "Defense will likely highlight this gap"
    }
  ],
  "total_treatment_span": {
    "first_treatment": "2024-03-15",
    "first_treatment_bates": "SMITH_0050",
    "last_treatment": "2024-09-10",
    "last_treatment_bates": "SMITH_0180",
    "total_days": 179
  },
  "treatment_frequency": {
    "total_visits": 45,
    "average_days_between": 4
  }
}
```

### 3.3 Damages Compilation

```json
{
  "economic_damages": {
    "past_medical": {
      "total_billed": 45250.00,
      "total_paid": 28500.00,
      "total_outstanding": 8750.00,
      "by_provider": [
        {
          "provider": "Memorial Hospital",
          "billed": 4850.00,
          "paid": 3200.00,
          "outstanding": 450.00,
          "bates_cite": "[SMITH_0200-0203]"
        }
      ],
      "by_category": {
        "emergency": 4850.00,
        "physician": 8500.00,
        "physical_therapy": 6400.00,
        "imaging": 5500.00,
        "injections": 12000.00,
        "surgery": 0,
        "dme": 500.00
      },
      "bill_summary_bates": "[SMITH_0200-0275]"
    },
    "future_medical": {
      "estimated_range": {
        "low": 15000.00,
        "high": 75000.00
      },
      "basis": "Surgical consultation recommends discectomy if conservative treatment fails",
      "basis_bates": "[SMITH_0175-0178]",
      "components": [
        {
          "item": "L4-L5 discectomy",
          "estimate": "45000-65000",
          "source": "Dr. Chen surgical estimate",
          "bates_cite": "[SMITH_0177]"
        },
        {
          "item": "Post-surgical PT",
          "estimate": "5000-8000",
          "source": "Standard of care"
        }
      ]
    },
    "lost_wages": {
      "past": {
        "amount": 9100.00,
        "period": "3/15/24 - 5/1/24",
        "days_missed": 32,
        "hourly_rate": 35.00,
        "documentation": "Employer letter, pay stubs, doctor notes",
        "bates_cites": {
          "employer_letter": "[SMITH_0280]",
          "pay_stubs": "[SMITH_0282-0290]",
          "work_restrictions": "[SMITH_0055, SMITH_0065, SMITH_0078]"
        }
      },
      "future": {
        "amount": 0,
        "basis": "Returned to full duty, no permanent restrictions yet"
      }
    },
    "lost_earning_capacity": {
      "claimed": false,
      "basis": null
    },
    "property_damage": {
      "vehicle_damage": 18500.00,
      "disposition": "Total loss",
      "gap_loss": 2100.00,
      "other_property": 0,
      "bates_cite": "[SMITH_0300-0305]"
    },
    "out_of_pocket": {
      "mileage": 450.00,
      "prescriptions": 380.00,
      "medical_equipment": 150.00,
      "other": 0,
      "bates_cite": "[SMITH_0310-0315]"
    },
    "total_economic": {
      "past_certain": 57880.00,
      "future_estimated": "15000-75000"
    }
  },
  "non_economic_damages": {
    "pain_and_suffering": {
      "physical_pain": {
        "description": "Daily neck and back pain for 7+ months",
        "current_level": "4-6/10 daily",
        "activities_affected": ["sleeping", "driving", "exercising", "playing with children"],
        "supporting_records": "[SMITH_0050-0180 throughout]"
      },
      "emotional_distress": {
        "description": "Anxiety when driving, frustration with limitations",
        "treatment": "No mental health treatment sought"
      },
      "loss_of_enjoyment": {
        "hobbies_affected": ["gardening", "hiking", "golf"],
        "duration": "Ongoing",
        "testimony_cite": "[Smith Depo. 95:10-97:5, SMITH_DEP_0095-0097]"
      }
    },
    "permanency": {
      "claimed": "Potential",
      "basis": "If surgery unsuccessful, estimated 8% whole person impairment per Dr. Chen",
      "basis_bates": "[SMITH_0178]",
      "rating": "Pending surgical outcome"
    }
  },
  "liens_and_reductions": {
    "health_insurance_lien": {
      "carrier": "Aetna",
      "amount": 28500.00,
      "type": "ERISA|state_law",
      "reduction_potential": "Typically negotiate to 50-60%",
      "estimated_payback": 14250.00,
      "lien_letter_bates": "[SMITH_0400-0402]"
    },
    "medicare_lien": null,
    "medicaid_lien": null,
    "workers_comp_lien": null,
    "child_support_lien": null,
    "attorney_lien": null
  }
}
```

### 3.4 Liability Analysis

```json
{
  "liability_theory": {
    "primary": "Negligence - Defendant failed to maintain safe following distance and rear-ended plaintiff's stopped vehicle",
    "elements": {
      "duty": "Defendant owed duty to operate vehicle safely and maintain proper lookout",
      "breach": "Defendant failed to stop, struck plaintiff's vehicle from behind",
      "causation": "Collision directly caused plaintiff's injuries",
      "damages": "Documented medical treatment and bills"
    }
  },
  "supporting_evidence": [
    {
      "evidence": "Police report",
      "significance": "Officer found defendant at fault, issued citation",
      "strength": "strong",
      "bates_cite": "[SMITH_0001-0008]"
    },
    {
      "evidence": "Defendant's statement to police",
      "significance": "Admitted 'didn't see traffic had stopped'",
      "strength": "strong",
      "bates_cite": "[SMITH_0005]"
    },
    {
      "evidence": "Vehicle damage photos",
      "significance": "Rear-end damage pattern consistent with plaintiff's account",
      "strength": "moderate",
      "bates_cite": "[SMITH_0320-0328]"
    }
  ],
  "potential_defenses": [
    {
      "defense": "Comparative negligence",
      "basis": "None apparent - plaintiff was stopped in traffic",
      "risk_level": "low",
      "response": "Clear rear-end presumption applies"
    },
    {
      "defense": "Pre-existing condition",
      "basis": "Defense will argue degenerative changes on MRI",
      "risk_level": "moderate",
      "response": "All treating physicians opine trauma aggravated condition; plaintiff was asymptomatic before accident",
      "supporting_cites": "[SMITH_0065 (Dr. Johnson); SMITH_0089 (Dr. Chen); SMITH_0113 (radiology)]"
    },
    {
      "defense": "Failure to mitigate",
      "basis": "35-day treatment gap in May",
      "risk_level": "low",
      "response": "Gap explained by work schedule; treatment otherwise consistent",
      "supporting_cite": "[SMITH_0095]"
    }
  ],
  "comparative_fault_assessment": {
    "plaintiff_percentage": 0,
    "basis": "Pure rear-end collision with stopped vehicle"
  },
  "liability_conclusion": {
    "strength": "strong",
    "percentage_likelihood": 95,
    "summary": "Clear liability. Defendant rear-ended plaintiff's stopped vehicle, was cited by police, and admitted fault. No viable comparative fault argument."
  }
}
```

## Output Format: Case Evaluation Summary

Generate the final summary in this structure:

```markdown
# CASE EVALUATION SUMMARY

## Case Information

| Field | Value |
|-------|-------|
| Case Name | [Plaintiff] v. [Defendant] |
| Date of Incident | [Date] |
| Case Type | [Motor Vehicle Accident / Premises Liability / etc.] |
| Date of Report | [Today] |
| Prepared By | [AI Assistant] |
| Bates Range | [First Bates] - [Last Bates] |

---

## Citation Key

This summary uses Bates number citations in brackets. Reference key:

| Prefix | Source |
|--------|--------|
| SMITH_ | Plaintiff's production |
| SMITH_DEP_ | Plaintiff's deposition transcript |
| DEF_ | Defendant's production |

---

## I. EXECUTIVE SUMMARY

[2-3 paragraph overview of the case, key facts, injuries, and valuation range]

---

## II. PARTIES

### Plaintiff

- **Name:** 
- **DOB:** 
- **Address:** 
- **Employment:** 

### Defendant

- **Name:** 
- **Insurance:** 
- **Policy Limits:**

[List with contact info and summary of anticipated testimony, with Bates cites to statements]

---

## III. FACTUAL SUMMARY

[Chronological narrative of the incident and aftermath with Bates citations]

Example: On March 15, 2024, plaintiff was traveling northbound on Highway 101 when she was struck from behind by defendant's vehicle. [SMITH_0001-0008] The investigating officer cited defendant for following too closely. [SMITH_0006] Defendant admitted to the officer that he "didn't see traffic had stopped." [SMITH_0005]

[Explain negligence elements with supporting citations]

| Strength | [Strong/Moderate/Weak] |

| Date | Provider | Type | Key Findings | Citation |

[Where is plaintiff now medically, with citation]

[Medical causation analysis with citations to physician opinions]

---

## VI. DAMAGES

### Economic Damages

| Category | Amount | Citation |

| Past Medical (Paid) | $ | |

| [Carrier] | $ | $ | [SMITH_0400-0402] |
```

## Iteration and Refinement

When the user asks to refine or update the summary:

-   "Focus more on X" - Expand that section with additional detail
    
-   "The medical is wrong" - Re-extract from source documents
    
-   "Add this information" - Incorporate new facts
    
-   "Make it more/less formal" - Adjust tone
    
-   "Prepare for mediation" - Shift framing to settlement-focused
    
-   "Prepare for trial" - Shift framing to jury persuasion
    
-   "Remove Bates citations" - Switch to document/page citations
    
-   "Add Bates to X section" - Ensure all citations in that section include Bates
    

**Always maintain Bates citations to source documents for all factual claims (when Bates numbers are available).**

---

## Quality Checklist

Before finalizing any case summary, verify:

-   \[ \] All dates are consistent across sections
    
-   \[ \] Medical providers match between chronology and bill summary
    
-   \[ \] Damage totals are mathematically correct
    
-   \[ \] All red flags have been addressed or noted
    
-   \[ \] Recommendations are actionable and specific
    
-   \[ \] **Bates citations are included for all factual claims (when available)**
    
-   \[ \] **Bates ranges are accurate and don't overlap incorrectly**
    
-   \[ \] **Bates index attachment is complete**
    
-   \[ \] No speculation presented as fact
    
-   \[ \] Privileged information properly marked
    
-   \[ \] Client name and identifiers consistent throughout
    

---

## Citation Fallback Rules

When Bates numbers are NOT available:

1.  Use document filename + page number: `[Memorial_ER_Records.pdf, p. 3]`
    
2.  Use document description + date + page: `[Memorial Hospital ER Records 3/15/24, p. 3]`
    
3.  For depositions without Bates: `[Smith Depo. 45:12-46:8]`
    

Always note in the summary header if documents lack Bates numbering:

```markdown
**Citation Note:** Documents in this matter have not been Bates-stamped. Citations reference source document filenames and page numbers.
```
